title: usual suspect would be BT pairing issues

messages.author: Zio
messages.text: Ok. Then my last try would be to flash Repeater role and see if it works or not. In case of failure, I would suspect HW failure, but maybe this flasher could do some magic: https://ssaprus.works/flasher I haven't tried my self, but read somewhere that could be a remedy.
messages.content_html: Ok. Then my last try would be to flash Repeater role and see if it works or not. In case of failure, I would suspect HW failure, but maybe this flasher could do some magic: https://ssaprus.works/flasher I haven't tried my self, but read somewhere that could be a remedy.
